calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-03-2017 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-11-2017 Continued To Mar-14-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Special appearance by Vivian Lercher, Esq. for Plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set Mar-14-2017 at 10:30 AM in Dept. 610. JUDGE TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk JLee. Proceedings not reported. (610)

Notice Of Motion And Plaintiffs Motion For Payment Of Attorneys Fees And Reimbursement Of Costs And Expenses
Off Calendar Dec-09-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Erika Kavicky of The Bickel Law Firm, Inc. telephone number 619-374-4100 appeared by telephone for Plaintiffs George Pitarra and Robyn Ashley.
Patrea Bullock of Universal & Shannon, LLP telephone number 916-780-4050 appeared by telephone for Defendant Mercedes-Benz USA, LLC.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court confirmed its tentative ruling.
Plaintiffs George Pitarra and Robyn Ashley's motion for payment of attorney's fees and costs is granted in large part. Plaintiffs are awarded attorney's fees of $33,197 and costs of $4,330.86 with a .1 multiplier on the fees of $3,319.70 for a total award of $40,847.56. After review of the papers filed on this motion and the docket, the court believes that all fees and costs claimed by plaintiffs were reasonably incurred, the hours expended were reasonable and the hourly rates are also reasonable. Plaintiffs' request for a .3 multiplier is too high given that plaintiffs' counsel had less of a contingent risk in this case than contingency fees lawyers often have and there was nothing extraordinary about either the result achieved or the work necessary to achieve that result. Order signed.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-06-2016 Continued To Jan-10-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Vivian Leung Lerche, Esq. appeared specially for Plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause Re Dismissal is re-set Jan-10-2017 at 10:30 AM in Dept. 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk JLee. Proceedings not reported. (610)
